name: Edith

passive.name: Overload
passive.description: After each skill cast, Edith and Phylax become Overloaded for 3s, during which all Basic Attacks will trigger chain lightning, dealing extra (Magic Damage) equal to ( +30% Total Magic Power) plus 4(+0.25*Hero Level)% of the target's Max HP to up to 4 enemies. Chain lightning damage against Minions is increased to 150%.
passive.tips: Edith has the potential to overwhelm her enemy in the early to mid game. With her Passive Overload, she can clear the lanes and suppress her enemy with ease from afar while quickly leveling up to Lv.4.

skill1.name: Earth Shatter
skill1.description: After a 0.75s delay, Edith controls Phylax to launch an earth-shattering blow in a designated direction, dealing 225( +10% Total HP) (Physical Damage) to enemies hit (deals 120% damage to Minions) and knocking them airborne for 1s. This skill won't be interrupted by regular control effects (excluding Suppression).
skill1.tips: Earth Shatter has a relatively long cast animation, thus it is recommended to couple it with Edith's teammate's control skill or cast it in a bush to increase the hit rate.

skill2.name: Onward
skill2.description: Edith controls Phylax to charge in the target direction, dealing 90( +3% Total HP) (Physical Damage) to enemies along the way. If Phylax hits an enemy hero during the charge, it will stop immediately and throw them over its shoulder, dealing 108( +5% Total HP) (Physical Damage).
skill2.tips: Onward is Edith's core skill. Use it to protect teammates or rip a tear in the enemy formation during the team fight.

ultimate.name: Primal Wrath
ultimate.description: (Passive:) When inside Phylax, Edith can accumulate Wrath according to the damage she receives (calculated before damage reduction). (Active:) Edith ejects herself forward from Phylax, knocking back nearby enemies. After that, she takes flight and can perform ranged Basic Attacks, each dealing 35( +75% Total Physical Attack) (+25% Total Magic Power) (Magic Damage). Edith also gains new skills in this state. When in flight, Edith gains 350( +5% Total HP)-350( +20% Total HP) extra Shield, 50%-150% extra Attack Speed and 5%-20% Hybrid Lifesteal based on the Wrath she accumulated, and converts each point of (Extra Physical Defense) and (Extra Magic Defense) into 3.2 (Magic Power). The flight state lasts up to 8s.

matchupSystem.strongAgainstReason: Edith is strong against heroes that are not very agile and on the fragile side, such as Zilong and Aulus, because her skills deal enough burst damage to eliminate them after connecting with her 2nd Skill.
matchupSystem.weakAgainstReason: Edith is countered by Marksmen that can negate CC like Hanabi and Wanwan, since she will have a hard time locking them down.
matchupSystem.synergyReason: Edith works best with heroes like Minotaur and Atlas that can more reliably CC a target first, allowing her to follow up with her own CC.

mechanicNote: Edith transforms into Marksman Form after using Ultimate. Marksman Form skills (Divine Retribution, Lightning Bolt) not currently available in local source.

powerCurve.description: Solid early with reliable CC setup, but her biggest swing is level 4 where Primal Wrath turns tanked damage into a strong ranged damage window for objectives and fights. Mid game is dominant with pick potential + frontlining, while late remains strong but more dependent on good Wrath timing and being able to free-hit in flight form.

combos.name: TEAMFIGHT
combos.description:
In teamfights, use Edith's 2nd Skill to toss the enemy behind her, followed by her 1st Skill to knock them airborne then immediately use her Ultimate.
Now use Edith's 2nd Skill in human form to immobilize the target, followed by her 1st Skill for more damage, and secure the kill with enhanced Basic Attacks.

combos.name: LANING
combos.description:
In the laning phase, use Edith's 2nd Skill to toss the enemy behind her,
then use her 1st Skill to knock them airborne
and finish them off with enhanced Basic Attacks from her Passive.
